global_description: A medium-sized songbird with a compact body and a short, thick bill. The male is bright red all over, while the female is yellowish-olive with a reddish tint on the wings and tail. Both have smooth, unpatterned plumage.

part_details.plumage: Male is bright red, female is yellowish-olive with reddish wings and tail.
part_details.bill: Short, thick, conical, suitable for seed eating.
part_details.wings: Medium length, smooth feathers, reddish tint on females.
part_details.tail: Medium length, slightly notched, reddish tint on females.

spatial_relations: The bill is positioned centrally on the face.
The wings extend laterally from the body.
The tail is positioned at the rear of the body.
